name_cn:
Name: Baguette Clutch
Model: 8889 Monogram
Quality: Top-tier Original Single
Color: Monogram Beige Fabric
Size: 20×13×3cm
Baguette Clutch, with a detachable fine chain, for hand or underarm carry. Zipper closure with a zipper pull featuring the iconic FF pattern. Fabric material with brown and tobacco yellow jacquard FF. Gold-tone hardware.
